name: Tenda 2K WiFi 6 Indoor PT Camera
description:
This indoor security camera delivers clear monitoring with a 3 MP sensor and 2K video quality. It uses AI human detection to help identify activity and provides real-time alerts for home observation.

The camera supports WiFi 6 connectivity, one-touch calling, PT movement, 10X digital zoom, and TF card storage. It is designed for convenient remote viewing and everyday indoor security needs.

name: Xiaomi Smart Camera 2K Indoor Security Camera
description:
This Xiaomi indoor security camera provides 2K video quality with a 360° panoramic view for flexible home monitoring. It connects with the Mi Home app and supports clear viewing in different lighting conditions.

The camera includes AI human detection, two-way voice calls, H.265 video encoding, and multiple storage options. Its compact design makes it suitable for home, office, and indoor security use.

name: Runpu NDI PTZ AI Tracking Camera
description:
Runpu NDI PTZ Camera is designed for video conferencing, streaming, and professional indoor setups. It provides 1080P Full HD video output with a Sony CMOS sensor and flexible connection options.

The camera features AI smart tracking, optical zoom, pan movement, and PoE support. It works with Windows and macOS systems for different professional video applications.

name: SHIWOJIA 36X Zoom Solar Security Camera
description:
This outdoor solar security camera provides long-distance monitoring with high-resolution video and 36X optical zoom. It supports 4G SIM and WiFi connections for flexible outdoor installation.

The camera includes solar charging, rechargeable battery power, PIR human detection, night vision, and remote app access. It is suitable for monitoring outdoor areas such as yards, entrances, and properties.

name: KERUI Fingerprint Lock
description:
KERUI Fingerprint Lock provides keyless access with fingerprint recognition and a rechargeable lithium battery. Its compact design makes it suitable for personal storage, travel, and everyday security needs.

The lock features USB charging support, a zinc alloy body, and IP67 waterproof protection. It works without traditional keys or passwords and offers a convenient smart locking solution.

name: RAYKUBE V1 Bluetooth Fingerprint Smart Lock
description:
RAYKUBE V1 Smart Lock provides multiple unlocking options including fingerprint, password, RFID card, app control, and mechanical key access. It is designed for different door types with a durable aluminium alloy body.

The lock uses Bluetooth technology and supports smart access control through connected devices. Its compact design provides convenient security options for modern homes and offices.

name: RAYKUBE K20 Biometric Smart Door Lock
description:
RAYKUBE K20 Smart Door Lock supports fingerprint, password, IC card, mechanical key, and app-based unlocking methods. It is designed with a zinc alloy body and supports smart home integration.

The lock offers Bluetooth connectivity, gateway support, and reversible handle direction. It is suitable for various door types and provides flexible access control options.

name: RAYKUBE L31 Smart Fingerprint Door Lock
description:
RAYKUBE L31 Smart Door Lock provides multiple access methods including fingerprint, NFC, IC card, mechanical key, and app control. It supports Tuya Smart Home Platform with Bluetooth connectivity.

The lock features an aluminium alloy body, gateway support, and reversible handle direction. It is designed for different door materials and modern smart home security setups.

name: 3 Pack Outdoor Solar Motion Sensor Lights
description:
These outdoor solar lights are designed for entrances, gardens, garages, and outdoor areas. They use solar power with LED lighting and motion sensor technology for automatic operation.

The lights feature a rechargeable battery, durable ABS body, and easy installation design. They provide a convenient lighting solution for improving visibility around outdoor spaces.

name: Neon RGB LED Strip Light
description:
This flexible neon RGB LED strip light is designed for gaming rooms, bedrooms, and decorative lighting setups. It supports multiple colors and lighting effects through remote and app control.

The strip uses modern LED technology with a flexible design and waterproof construction. It helps create customized lighting environments for homes, entertainment spaces, and creative projects.

name: 220V COB LED Strip Light
description:
This COB LED strip light provides bright and flexible lighting for homes, kitchens, outdoor areas, and creative decoration projects. It uses COB LED technology for a smooth lighting effect.

The strip features waterproof protection, dimmable lighting support, and flexible installation options. It can be adjusted for different spaces while providing long-lasting illumination.

name: GUHUAVMI ET571 Health Monitoring Smartwatch
description:
This smartwatch features a large AMOLED display with smart functions for Android and iOS users. It supports Bluetooth calling, voice assistant features, sports tracking, and daily activity monitoring.

The watch includes health tracking tools, multiple sports modes, notifications, weather updates, music control, and other practical features. Its modern design makes it suitable for everyday wearable use.

name: Ultra 2 AMOLED Smart Watch
description:
This smartwatch features an AMOLED touchscreen display with a stylish design and support for Android and iOS devices. It includes Bluetooth calling, built-in GPS, and customizable watch faces.

The watch provides activity tracking, sports modes, smart notifications, music control, and daily tools. It is designed for users looking for a modern wearable with smart features.

name: ECG Health Analysis Smart Watch
description:
This smartwatch features an AMOLED display with ECG and PPG-based health tracking functions. It supports Android and iOS devices with Bluetooth calling and smart app connectivity.

The device includes activity tracking, sleep monitoring, message notifications, wireless charging, and customizable watch faces. It combines smart features with a modern wearable design for daily use.

name: Women AMOLED ECG Smart Watch
description:
This smartwatch features a round AMOLED display with smart health and activity tracking functions. It supports Android and iOS devices with Bluetooth calling and customizable watch faces.

The watch includes sports tracking, sleep monitoring, stress tracking, notifications, music control, and daily utility tools. Its stylish design makes it suitable for everyday wearable use.

name: Ultra Thin AMOLED Smart Watch
description:
This ultra-thin smartwatch features a large AMOLED touch display with always-on display support. It works with Android and iOS devices and provides Bluetooth calling with AI voice assistant features.

The watch includes health tracking, sports modes, smart notifications, music control, weather updates, and NFC functions. Its slim design provides a comfortable experience for everyday wear.

name: OnePlus Solar Fast Charging Power Bank
description:
This portable power bank features a high-capacity battery with built-in charging cables and a digital display for checking remaining power. It supports solar charging and works with various USB-compatible devices.

The power bank provides fast charging support, multiple output options, LED flashlight functionality, and a portable design. It is suitable for travel, outdoor activities, and everyday charging needs.

name: KUULAA Qi2 Magnetic Power Bank 10000mAh
description:
This portable power bank features a 10000mAh battery with Qi2 magnetic wireless charging support for compatible devices. It includes USB Type-C connectivity and a durable metal shell design.

The device supports 20W PD fast charging, two-way charging technology, battery status display, and a built-in LED lamp. It provides a convenient charging solution for daily mobile use.

name: Baseus 30000mAh 65W Fast Charging Power Bank
description:
This Baseus power bank features a 30000mAh battery capacity and supports fast charging for smartphones, tablets, and compatible laptops. It includes a digital display to show the remaining battery level.

The device supports USB Type-C PD charging, multiple ports, and two-way charging technology. Its portable design makes it useful for travel, work, and everyday device charging.

name: Mini 50000mAh Fast Charging Power Bank
description:
This portable power bank features a large 50000mAh battery with built-in charging cables and a digital display. It supports fast charging for smartphones and other compatible USB devices.

The device includes an integrated stand, safety protection system, and convenient portable design. It is suitable for users who need extended battery capacity during travel and daily activities.

name: Baseus 30000mAh 65W Power Bank
description:
This Baseus portable power bank provides a 30000mAh battery capacity with 65W USB Type-C PD fast charging support. It is designed for charging smartphones, tablets, laptops, and other compatible devices.

The power bank includes a digital display, multiple USB outputs, and two-way charging technology. Its compact design provides a practical charging option for home, office, and travel use.

name: QOOVI 50000mAh 100W Power Bank
description:
This QOOVI power bank features a 50000mAh battery and supports up to 100W fast charging for laptops, smartphones, and other compatible devices. It includes a TFT digital display and built-in cable.

The device supports USB Type-C input, dual USB outputs, and two-way charging technology. It provides a high-capacity charging solution for multiple devices.

name: KUULAA Qi2 Magnetic 10000mAh Power Bank
description:
This KUULAA power bank features a 10000mAh battery with Qi2 magnetic wireless charging and 20W PD fast charging support. It is designed for compatible smartphones and mobile devices.

The device includes USB Type-C charging, LED status indicator, built-in LED lamp, and a durable metal shell. It provides a compact charging solution for everyday use.

name: 200000mAh 120W Solar Power Bank
description:
This high-capacity power bank features a 200000mAh battery with up to 120W charging support for multiple USB-powered devices. It includes USB Type-C and dual USB output options.

The device comes with an LED digital display for battery monitoring and supports various smartphones, tablets, and USB-compatible devices. Its portable design makes it suitable for outdoor and emergency charging needs.

name: VBNM Bone Conduction Bluetooth Sports Headphones with 32GB MP3 Memory
description:
VBNM bone conduction headphones use open-ear technology to deliver sound through the jawbones while keeping the ears open for environmental awareness. They feature Bluetooth connectivity, built-in 32GB memory for offline MP3 playback, and an ergonomic design for sports and outdoor activities.

Designed for swimming and active use, these wireless headphones include IPX8 waterproof protection, a built-in microphone, control buttons, and support activities such as running, cycling, surfing, diving, and mountain climbing.
features: True bone conduction audio technology with open-ear design
32GB built-in memory for offline MP3 music playback
IPX8 waterproof protection for swimming and water activities
Bluetooth connectivity with up to 20m wireless range
Bluetooth 5.3 support with AAC codec compatibility
Built-in microphone and integrated control buttons
Lightweight 32g design with up to 8 hours battery life

name: Baseus BC1 Open Ear Clip Wireless Earbuds
description:
Baseus BC1 open-ear clip earbuds feature an OWS design with a breathable open-ring structure and ergonomic tri-curve clip for comfortable wearing. They use Bluetooth 6.0 connectivity, 12mm dynamic drivers, and 4-mic AI clear calls for wireless audio and communication.

These true wireless earbuds include IP55 dust and water resistance, dual connection support, app compatibility, and Type-C charging. They are designed for sports, outdoor activities, office use, gaming, and everyday mobile phone audio.
features: Open-ear clip design with breathable comfort structure
12mm dynamic driver with enhanced bass performance
IP55 dust and water resistance rating
Up to 38 hours total playback with charging case
Type-C charging with AAC and SBC codec support

name: GDLYL TWS Bluetooth 5.0 Waterproof Sport Earbuds
description:
GDLYL true wireless earbuds feature Bluetooth 5.0 connectivity, HiFi stereo sound, dual wear style, and a semi-open earcup design. They include a built-in microphone, volume control, and charging case support for everyday mobile and sports use.

These wireless earbuds provide IPX7 waterproof protection against water and sweat, with up to 20 hours total playback using the charging case. They support stable wireless connection, fast pairing, and applications including common headphone use, mobile phones, HiFi audio, and sports activities.
features: IPX7 waterproof design for sports and outdoor use
HiFi stereo sound with dynamic drivers
Dual wear style with semi-open earcups
Up to 20 hours playback with charging case
Charging case with rechargeable battery support

name: Baseus Bass EP10 NC True Wireless Noise Cancelling Earbuds
description:
Baseus Bass EP10 NC true wireless earbuds feature Bluetooth 6.0 connectivity, -43dB active noise cancellation, 12mm dynamic drivers, and SuperBass audio technology. They include 4-mic AI ENC for clear calls, IP55 water and dust resistance, and support the Baseus App for device management.

These TWS in-ear earbuds provide up to 41 hours of battery life with the charging case and support Type-C charging. Designed for mobile phones, gaming, office use, internet bars, and HiFi audio applications, they offer wireless convenience with a compact design.
features: 4-mic AI ENC for clearer voice calls
IP55 water and dust resistant design
Up to 41 hours total battery life with case
Baseus App support for settings and updates
Type-C charging with replaceable ear tips

name: UGREEN Qi2.2 25W 15W 2-in-1 Magnetic Wireless Charger Stand
description:
UGREEN Qi2.2 25W 15W 2-in-1 Magnetic Wireless Charger Stand is a multifunctional wireless charging stand designed for compatible phones, smart watches, and earphones. It features magnetic wireless charging technology and supports Apple iPhone devices with Qi certification.

The charger includes a foldable design, charging indicator, Type-C connector, and support for charging multiple devices. It comes with a cable and is certified with RoHS, CE, and FCC standards.
features: Supports compatible phones, smart watches, and earphones

name: CrownQu Qi2.2 25W 3-in-1 Metal Magnetic Wireless Charger Station
description:
CrownQu Qi2.2 25W 3-in-1 Metal Magnetic Wireless Charger Station is a foldable magnetic wireless charging device designed for phones, smart watches, and earphones. It supports Qi2 wireless charging protocol with magnetic alignment, temperature control management, and up to 25W maximum output power for supported models.

The charger features a metal construction, 360° rotation design, 16 N52 neodymium iron boron magnets, and a Type-C connector. It includes a charging cable and supports multiple device charging with UL, WEEE, RoHS, CE, and FCC certifications.
features: Qi2.2 magnetic wireless charging protocol support
3-in-1 charging for phones, smart watches, and earphones
Up to 25W maximum output power for supported models
16 N52 neodymium iron boron magnets for magnetic alignment
Temperature control management for charging operation

name: Truly Qi2 3-in-1 Magnetic Touch Button Wireless Charger Dock Station
description:
Truly Qi2 3-in-1 Magnetic Touch Button Wireless Charger Dock Station is a wireless charging station designed for phones, smart watches, earphones, tablets, controllers, mice, and other compatible devices. It supports Qi2 wireless charging technology, magnetic attachment, touch rotation, and electric rotation functions.

The charger features a metal body, hidden charging compartment, intelligent temperature control, FOD detection, and charging indicator. It supports Apple iPhone, AirPods, and Apple Watch charging, includes a Type-C cable, and comes with a gift box and instruction manual.
features: 3-in-1 charging support for phone, watch, and earphones
Touch rotation and electric rotation design
Hidden charging compartment and charging indicator
Metal body construction with foldable desktop design
Intelligent temperature control and FOD detection
Compatible with iPhone, AirPods, and Apple Watch devices
Includes Type-C charging cable and gift box

name: Essager 3-in-1 Portable Folding Wireless Charger Stand 15W Magnetic
description:
Essager 3-in-1 Portable Folding Wireless Charger Stand is a wireless charging stand designed for compatible phones, smart watches, and earphones. It supports Apple iPhone devices and features magnetic wireless charging functionality with a holder design.

The charger uses a Type-C connector and provides up to 15W maximum output power. It is certified with CE, FCC, and RoHS standards and is designed for wireless charging of compatible devices.
features: Compatible with phones, smart watches, and earphones

name: UGREEN Qi2 25W MAX Magnetic Wireless Charger Stand 3-in-1
description:
UGREEN Qi2 25W MAX Magnetic Wireless Charger Stand is a 3-in-1 wireless charging stand designed for compatible iPhone devices, AirPods, and smart watches. It supports magnetic wireless charging with secure alignment and uses a Type-C connector for USB-C power sources.

The charger features a foldable structure, charging indicator, holder design, and multi-device charging capability. It supports Qi certification with RoHS, CE, and FCC certifications and is designed for daily use and travel.
features: 3-in-1 charging support for phones, smart watches, and earphones
Up to 25W maximum output power support
Type-C connector for USB-C power sources
Magnetic alignment for secure charging placement
Qi, RoHS, CE, and FCC certified

name: UYUXIO Strong Magnetic Wireless Car Phone Charger 15W Air Vent Holder
description:
UYUXIO Strong Magnetic Wireless Car Phone Charger is an air vent car phone holder with magnetic wireless charging support for compatible Apple iPhone models. It features a strong magnetic attachment system, built-in cooling fan, LED charging indicator, and Type-C cable.

The charger is designed for in-car wireless charging and phone holding through an adjustable air vent mount. It supports up to 15W wireless charging with a maximum output power of 30W and includes Qi certification with CE, FCC, RoHS, and UL certifications.
features: Magnetic wireless charging for compatible iPhone models
Air vent car phone holder design
Built-in cooling fan for heat management
Qi, CE, FCC, RoHS, and UL certified

name: UGREEN Qi2.2 25W Magnetic Car Wireless Charger Stand
description:
UGREEN Qi2.2 25W Magnetic Car Wireless Charger Stand is a wireless charging car mount designed for compatible Apple iPhone models. It supports Qi2 magnetic wireless charging, MagSafe technology, and secure magnetic alignment through a Type-C connector.

The charger features a holder design, blue LED charging indicator, and upright viewing angle for use while driving. It supports wireless output from 7.5W to 25W, includes a charging cable, and is certified with CE and RoHS standards.

name: 3-in-1 Wireless Charger Station with Mobile Phone Holder
description:
3-in-1 Wireless Charger Station is a wireless charging dock with a mobile phone holder function designed for compatible Apple devices. It supports charging for Apple mobile phones, Apple Watch models, and AirPods through wireless charging technology.

The charger features a multifunctional design with charging cables included, USB and Type-C interface support, and compatibility with phones, smart watches, and earphones. It supports wireless charging through USB or DC power connections and includes CE and FCC certifications.
features: Compatible with Apple phones, watches, and AirPods

name: AOHI THE YOUTH 65W GaN Charger 3-Port USB-C PD Charger
description:
AOHI THE YOUTH 65W GaN Charger is a quick charger with a maximum output power of 65W and USB power source support. It features two USB-C ports and one USB-A port, supporting USB PD, Qualcomm Quick Charge, BC1.2, and other fast charging protocols for multiple device compatibility.

The charger uses GaN technology, PFC+AHB Half Bridge Structure, and Three-Stage Charging Technology to improve energy conversion efficiency and provide stable charging performance. It supports intelligent dynamic power allocation for charging iPhone, laptop, tablet, and other compatible devices.
features: 65W maximum output power for fast charging
GaN technology for a compact and portable design
Three charging ports with two USB-C and one USB-A
Supports USB PD, Qualcomm Quick Charge, and BC1.2 protocols
PFC+AHB Half Bridge Structure for efficient energy conversion
Designed for iPhone, laptop, tablet, and other compatible devices

name: Ubigbuy BK-126D 420W GaN Charger 8-Port USB-C PD Charger
description:
Ubigbuy BK-126D is a 420W GaN desktop charger with eight output ports, including six USB-C ports and two USB-A ports. It supports Intelligent Charge, a digital display screen, and multiple fast charging protocols such as USB PD, PPS, Qualcomm Quick Charge, Samsung Adaptive Fast Charge, and Huawei charging protocols.

The charger uses GaN technology and provides high-power charging with multiple device compatibility. It supports laptops, smartphones, tablets, and other compatible devices with various power distribution combinations through its multiple USB-C and USB-A outputs.
features: GaN technology with desktop charging design
Six USB-C ports and two USB-A ports
Digital display screen for charging information
Supports USB PD, PPS, QC, and other fast charging protocols
Multiple power distribution modes for simultaneous charging

name: AOHI Magcube Pro 140W GaN PD3.1 3-Port USB Charger
description:
AOHI Magcube Pro AOC-C012 is a 140W GaN charger with three USB ports, supporting USB Type-C and USB-A connectors. It features Intelligent Charge, Quick Charge, USB data transmission support, and USB PD3.1 charging with multiple output voltage options for compatible devices.

The charger is designed for tablets, laptops, smartphones, smartwatches, and other devices. It includes protection features such as input overvoltage protection, output overcurrent protection, output overvoltage protection, over temperature protection, and short circuit protection.
features: GaN technology for efficient charging performance
Three USB ports with USB-C and USB-A support
Supports USB PD3.1, Intelligent Charge, and Quick Charge
Compatible with laptops, tablets, phones, and smartwatches
Multiple safety protection features including temperature and overcurrent protection

name: Rocoren 200W GaN 8-in-1 Desktop Fast Charger
description:
Rocoren 8-in-1 GaN Charger is a desktop charging hub designed for multiple device charging with GaN technology. It supports USB PD, Qualcomm Quick Charge, Apple Fast Charging, Samsung Adaptive Fast Charge, Huawei FCP, Huawei Quick Charge, BC1.2, and other fast charging protocols.

The charger features an Intelligent Charge Management System that detects connected devices and provides suitable power output. It includes four USB-A ports, three USB-C ports, and interchangeable EU, UK, US, and KR plugs for different regional usage.
features: GaN technology for compact and efficient charging
Supports USB PD and multiple fast charging protocols
Intelligent Charge Management System for device recognition
Four USB-A ports and three USB-C ports
Includes interchangeable EU, UK, US, and KR plugs
Compatible with phones, tablets, and laptops

name: Essager 15W Ice Cooling Magnetic Wireless Car Charger
description:
The Essager 15W Ice Cooling Magnetic Wireless Car Charger is a magnetic car phone holder with integrated wireless charging for compatible smartphones. It supports up to 15W wireless output, connects through a Type-C interface, and includes a charging cable for convenient installation.

Designed for in-car use, it combines magnetic phone mounting with wireless charging in a multifunctional design. The charger features an ice cooling system, LED light, and charging indicator to support everyday driving while keeping your phone securely positioned and powered.

name: UGREEN Qi2 25W Max 3-in-1 Magnetic Wireless Charger Stand
description:
The UGREEN Qi2 25W Max 3-in-1 Magnetic Wireless Charger Stand is a foldable charging station designed for compatible Apple iPhone devices, AirPods, and smart watches. It supports magnetic wireless charging, USB Type-C connectivity, and a multifunctional design that allows multiple devices to be charged from a single stand.

Its foldable construction makes it convenient for travel and everyday use while magnetic alignment helps position compatible devices securely. The built-in charging indicator provides charging status at a glance, and the charger is certified by RoHS, CE, FCC, Qi, and MFI for compatibility and compliance.
features: 3-in-1 charging for phone, smart watch, and earphones

name: Baseus 30W GaN USB-C PD Travel Charger
description:
The Baseus 30W GaN USB-C PD Travel Charger is a compact AC-powered charger designed for compatible smartphones and tablets. It features a USB Type-C output with up to 30W maximum power and uses GaN technology to support efficient charging in a travel-friendly form factor.

The charger supports multiple fast charging protocols, including USB Power Delivery, Qualcomm Quick Charge, Samsung Adaptive Fast Charging, Huawei FCP, and Huawei Quick Charge. It does not include a charging cable, display screen, or intelligent charging functions, and is certified by RoHS, CE, and CCC.
features: Compatible with Samsung Adaptive Fast Charging and Huawei FCP

name: Baseus 15W Qi2 Foldable Magnetic Wireless Charger Stand
description:
The Baseus 15W Qi2 Foldable Magnetic Wireless Charger Stand is a wireless charging stand designed for compatible Apple iPhone models and AirPods. It supports Qi2 magnetic wireless charging with up to 15W output, uses a USB Type-C connection, and features a compact foldable design for convenient everyday use and travel.

The adjustable viewing angle allows comfortable positioning while charging for activities such as video calls or media viewing. Magnetic alignment helps keep compatible devices securely positioned, and the package includes a Type-C charging cable along with a choice of a 20W EU or UK plug.
features: Supports up to 15W Qi2 magnetic wireless charging
Compatible with Apple iPhone and AirPods

name: Baseus Qi2 15W Mini Magnetic Wireless Charger
description:
The Baseus Qi2 15W Mini Magnetic Wireless Charger is a compact magnetic wireless charging device designed for compatible iPhone models and Qi2-enabled devices. It supports up to 15W wireless charging output, uses a Type-C connector for power input, and is compatible with phones and earphones.

The charger features magnetic alignment for secure device placement and a lightweight mini design for convenient carrying. It is certified with CE, FCC, and RoHS standards, does not contain high-concern chemicals, and includes the wireless charger unit without a charging cable.
features: Supports up to 15W magnetic wireless charging
